name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken Fingers
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless chicken breast, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine orange juice and lime juice.
2. Add sugar, onion powder, crushed thyme, ground red pepper, black pepper, allspice, salt, nutmeg, and ground cloves to the juice mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Place chicken strips in a baking dish and pour the marinade over top. Cover the dish and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Preheat grill to medium heat and adjust grate to the highest setting.
5. Remove chicken from the marinade and season with additional spices if desired.
6. Grill chicken on both sides for 1 hour or until fully cooked, depending on appetite and spice preference.
Note: This recipe is attributed to Robert C. Johnson, who lives in Moncks Corner, SC, and is a pastor of Living Faith Outreach Ministries, chef at Medway Plantation, and owner of Johnsonian Catering. He published "Thou Preparest a Table."
